title: The Unified Utterance Gorge

features.name: convergence-maw
features.desc-on-touch: The gorge tightens to a point where individual stone voices can no longer maintain separation. They merge into single roar.

features.name: echo-depth
features.desc-on-touch: Sound falls here without returning to surface. It sinks into some bottom that the gorge keeps secret.

features.name: unified-static-field
features.desc-on-touch: All the stone voices at once, undifferentiated, like white noise that used to be language.

features.name: petrification-compression
features.desc-on-touch: Where sound pressure has turned to stone-memory. The gorge walls hold every voice it ever received.

features.name: the-silence-threshold
features.desc-on-touch: Beyond this point the roar becomes so unified it becomes indistinguishable from silence. Few things reach here.

inscription: the many voices learned that their only true harmony was to stop singing. now they hum at a frequency too low for the archive to hear.

file.name: Gorge_Recording_44hours_Continuous.mp3
file.note: 44 hours of continuous gorge sound, never repeating. Encoded within it, supposedly, all the individual voices that unified here. Cannot be decoded.

exits.label: back to where the stone voices were still singing separately
where the gorge emerges into whatever sky lies above
where one voice managed to escape the unification
back to where voices could still name themselves
